tasks.title: Replace in-memory auth/session/reset stores with Postgres-backed repositories.

notes.text: Identity auth/session/reset persistence migrated to Postgres with schema + repository + smoke validation.

tasks.title: Add gateway proxies + ACL matrix for next Sprint 1 routes (/api/events/*, /api/registrations/*).

notes.text: Started Sprint 1 step 2: complete gateway proxies and ACL matrix coverage for events/registrations/profile routes.

Introduced explicit gateway ACL/proxy route matrix for /api/events/*, /api/registrations/*, and /api/profile/participations via routing module; added and passed unit tests in tests/s1-t02.gateway-acl-matrix.unit.test.js.

tasks.title: Add docker-compose and CI job to run test:s1-m01 automatically.

notes.text: Added docker-compose.s1-m01.yml and GitHub Actions workflow to run test:s1-m01 automatically; updated s1-m01 smoke test for portable repo paths and external Postgres mode. Local end-to-end run remains blocked in this environment due missing pnpm/runtime dependencies.
S1-M01 automation is in place: dedicated docker-compose Postgres stack and CI workflow running pnpm test:s1-m01 automatically on PR/push with deterministic setup/teardown.
Fixing GitHub Actions s1-m01-smoke install failure caused by pnpm-lock.yaml being out of date with apps/docs-portal/package.json.

Updated the workspace lockfile for the docs portal and frontend manifests, pinned packageManager to pnpm 10.33.0, and verified corepack pnpm install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts succeeds locally.

tasks.title: S1-M06 hardening on current services: structured logs + guaranteed x-correlation-id tracing on every auth path (Gateway + Identity), plus smoke assertions.

notes.text: Gateway propagates x-correlation-id and smoke validates one auth flow; structured log format is not implemented yet.
Started Sprint 1 step 4: structured logs and guaranteed x-correlation-id tracing on Gateway + Identity auth paths.

Added structured JSON request logs for auth paths in api-gateway and identity-access-service, enforced x-correlation-id header propagation middleware in identity, and extended s1-m01 smoke assertions to require x-correlation-id on auth responses. Local full smoke execution remains blocked in this environment because services cannot boot without installed runtime dependencies.

Refactored observability into testable middleware modules, enforced correlation-id middleware and structured auth-path completion logging for Gateway + Identity, and added passing unit coverage in tests/s1-t04.observability.unit.test.js; smoke assertions for x-correlation-id remain in tests/s1-m01.smoke.test.js.
Auto-start from prompt: I05.2 auth security audit events in BackLog_identity_access.md

tasks.title: S1-M02 implementation start: scaffold event-management-service with Postgres and implement POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/events/drafts* + ownership rules.

notes.text: Started implementation: event-management-service scaffold + drafts CRUD + ownership rules.
Implemented event-management-service draft CRUD with Postgres, ownership guards, and passing S1-T05 smoke + S1-M01 regression.

tasks.title: Wire Gateway routes for events and extend role guards (ORGANIZER, ADMIN) with the same contract style as S1-M01.

notes.text: Started Sprint 1 step 1: gateway event route wiring and role guards.

Gateway routes added for /api/events/* plus participant route ACL skeleton for /api/registrations/* and /api/profile/participations; smoke test added. Runtime verification is pending because this environment lacks docker and installed service dependencies (express).
Step 5: finalize S1-T06 by strengthening route/ACL contract verification for event gateway paths.

Gateway event routes are fully wired with organizer/admin guards in shared routing matrix; exact target-path contracts and ACL expectations are covered by passing unit tests (tests/s1-t02.gateway-acl-matrix.unit.test.js).
